problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
